title: plagiobothrys tener var. subglaber
intro: Plagiobothrys tener var. subglaber, also known as annual fumewort, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to North America. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its expectorant properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. The health benefits of Plagiobothrys tener var. subglaber include its ability to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating colds and flu. Plagiobothrys tener var. subglaber can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
